description.unified: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing ATK P.DMG. On Crit Hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. This skill’s DMG is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound]. [(removed) immune to all damage while casting.]
Removes harmful effects from self and increases ATK and Critical Hit Chance by [600->500] for [10 sec->15sec].

Performs a series of attacks, dealing Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away. [(added) The DMG of this skill is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound], and all stacks are consumed on the final hit.]
On a Critical Hit, increases ATK for 10sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10. [(removed) If [Wound Stacks] is 10, deals additional damage equal to 150% of Attack Power.]

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is replaced with an effect that increases Critical Damage by [120%->65%], and damage dealt to bosses is increased by 30%.
Gain 45 Physical Dodge per stack. [(removed) If there are 5 or more stacks, all damage taken is reduced by 20%.]

description.unified: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}% [(added) and increases Armor Penetration by 800 while casting] [(removed) and reduces the target's P.Block Chance by 500 for 10 sec].
[Sharp End] Increases ATK Boost by 50% and recovers additional {0} MP upon a Crit Hit for the Skill's duration.
[Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}%, [(added) and adds 1 Wound per attack] [(removed) and upon a Crit Hit, recovers Mana by 200].

dark.unified: When using a skill, has a 10% chance to increase your Critical Damage by [10%->7%]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: On each Crit Hit, increases own ATK Spd by {0}% and Crit DMG by {1}% for 15 sec. This effect stacks up to [5->8] times.
